philosophy: Open Standard, Protected Core, Zero E-Waste

version_targets.0.2.0: Foundation complete — QFDM core, streaming pipeline, codec terminal firmware operational
version_targets.0.5.0: Next Phase complete — frontend REST client, PIN pairing, IAM sovereignty migrated
version_targets.0.9.0: Production hardening complete — HA, multi-DC, monitoring, security audit cleared
version_targets.1.0.0: Public launch — internet-facing codec terminals, billing, scale phase begins

foundation.description: Core product: QFDM system, streaming pipeline, codec terminal firmware, security baseline.

next_phase.description: Frontend integration, IAM sovereignty migration, PIN pairing, QFDM slice allocator.

production.description: High availability, multi-DC, monitoring, automated provisioning, security audit closure.

scale.description: Internet-facing terminals, billing, licensing, AI governance, community growth.

milestones.title: Sunshine/Moonlight Streaming Pipeline
milestones.description: End-to-end hardware-accelerated streaming from VM GPU (NVENC/VAAPI/AMF) to Codec Terminal decode (/dev/dri/renderD128). H.264 for Basic Terminals, AV1 for Pro Terminals.

tasks.description: Sunshine transport integration in orchestrator (replaces Guacamole for new deployments).
Actor service — VM lifecycle management (start/stop/screenshot/ping/logoff) via Sunshine API.
Moonlight CLI subprocess management in Qt/QML frontend (KMS/DRM hardware decode path).
UDP direct P2P streaming — orchestrator brokers connection, does NOT proxy media.

milestones.title: Codec Terminal Reference Firmware
milestones.description: Reference SBC firmware image: Debian Minimal + Sway Kiosk + Coffee Pie Qt GUI + USB-IP for peripherals. Boots directly into fullscreen frameless kiosk mode at 1920x1080.

tasks.description: Debian Minimal base image with Sway Wayland compositor in kiosk mode.
Coffee Pie Qt GUI (C++ + QML, CMake build) — fullscreen frameless, multi-language support.
USB-IP kernel module integration for peripheral passthrough (keyboard, mouse, gamepad, storage).
Over-the-air (OTA) firmware update mechanism with rollback protection.

milestones.title: QFDM Quantized Fractional Distribution Engine
milestones.description: Core patented QFDM system: demand quantization, resource fractionation, machine instantiation, and real-time transmission. The 'airport' that allocates server 'seats' (slices) to codec terminals.

tasks.description: Slice definition engine — CPU (1 vCore), RAM (1 GB), SSD (8 GB), GPU (125 MB), NET (8 Mbps), HDD (125 GB), RES (15 vMPX/s), IA (3 TOPS INT8) per Coffee Pie Slice specification.
Demand quantization and resource scheduling — O(n) linear allocation with clear rush-hour ceiling.
Power consumption monitoring and warnings — automatic suspension on crypto-mining or abuse detection.

milestones.title: Hardware-Software Circularity & Zero E-Waste
milestones.description: Core sustainability mission: hardware health monitoring, extended lifecycle optimization, e-waste telemetry. Any feature promoting planned obsolescence is strictly prohibited.

tasks.description: Zero E-Waste Telemetry — monitor hardware health to suggest maintenance, repair, or responsible recycling.
Low-power mode optimization for legacy ARM SBC hardware nodes.
Hardware lifecycle extension reporting — generate repair/upgrade recommendations per terminal.

milestones.title: Security Baseline Hardening
milestones.description: Close the top CRITICAL findings from the 2026-05-25 Security Audit. Eliminate undefined behavior in Rust unsafe blocks and input validation gaps.

tasks.description: Replace UnsafeCell in SessionRecoveryBuffer with safe concurrency primitive (tokio::sync::Mutex or crossbeam channel).
Fix addin.rs transmute between incompatible FreeRDP function pointer types — use proper type-safe FFI wrapper.
Sandbox process.rs — restrict JS-launched commands to a whitelist and chroot/jail context.
Sanitize chpasswd input — reject newlines and shell metacharacters in user/password fields.
Harden noverify.rs — add runtime check ensuring TLS bypass is only active on internal L2/L3 private IP ranges.
Replace 70+ unwrap/expect calls in network-facing paths with proper error handling and graceful degradation.

milestones.title: Dependency & Supply Chain Cleanup
milestones.description: Pin all dependencies, purge unmaintained packages, eliminate git-sourced deps, fix stale lock files.

tasks.description: Pin all orchestrator Python dependencies with exact versions (full pip freeze).
Replace unmaintained pqcrypto with Rust libcrux via sidecar subprocess or PyO3 FFI for orchestrator KEM operations.
Pin ldap3 git dependency to specific commit hash or migrate to maintained PyPI release.
Delete stale sub-Cargo.lock files (actor/crates/service/Cargo.lock, actor/crates/client/Cargo.lock).

milestones.title: Frontend REST API Integration
milestones.description: Add QNetworkAccessManager-based REST client to Qt/QML frontend. Replace hardcoded data with API responses from orchestrator.

tasks.description: QNetworkAccessManager REST client — async HTTP/WebSocket communication with orchestrator.
Orchestrator URL configuration (config file + env var, no hardcoded IPs).
Multi-orchestrator fallback list with health-check and automatic failover.

milestones.title: Moonlight PIN Pairing & Session Management
milestones.description: User-facing PIN dialog for Moonlight pairing flow. Session lifecycle: connect, recover, disconnect with visual feedback.

tasks.description: PIN dialog UI in QML — numeric input, copy-to-clipboard, timeout countdown, pairing status.
Session state machine — connect, streaming, paused, disconnected, recover with visual indicators.
Session recovery after network interruption — buffer replay and automatic reconnection.

milestones.title: Technological Sovereignty & Open IAM
milestones.description: Migrate core backend identity services from Firebase to Supabase (PostgreSQL-based, self-hostable IAM). Aligns with AGENTS.md Decision on technological sovereignty.

tasks.description: Migrate user authentication from Firebase Auth to Supabase Auth (JWT, OAuth2, social logins).
Migrate Firebase Admin SDK service account to Supabase service role key with Row Level Security (RLS).
Update proxmox_backend Bearer token validation to accept Supabase JWT alongside Firebase (graceful migration period).

milestones.title: Website & Public Presence
milestones.description: Complete the migration away from Wix/Avo platform. Pure Vanilla JS, HTML, CSS e-commerce with multi-language support via translations.json.

tasks.description: Complete removal of all Wix/Avo dependencies (JS bundles, inline scripts, platform CSS).
Vanilla JS e-commerce: cart, checkout, payment integration (Stripe/Wompi), order tracking.
Multi-language SEO optimization with translations.json — Spanish-first, 10+ languages.

milestones.title: Orchestrator High Availability
milestones.description: Eliminate single points of failure in the management plane. Database replication, orchestrator HA restart, session persistence.

tasks.description: PostgreSQL streaming replication — standby replica with automatic failover.
Orchestrator HA via Proxmox HA restart — automatic VM recovery on host failure.
Session state persistence across orchestrator restarts — TicketStore recovery.

milestones.title: Multi-DC MetaPool Configuration
milestones.description: Cross-datacenter resource pooling. Codec Terminals connect to nearest DC with automatic failover.

tasks.description: Multi-DC orchestrator federation — shared PostgreSQL, distributed scheduling.
GeoDNS-based terminal routing — connect to lowest-latency DC with automatic failover.
Cross-DC VM migration for load balancing and maintenance windows.

milestones.title: Monitoring, Alerting & Observability
milestones.description: Production-grade monitoring stack: metrics, logs, traces, alerts. Proactive detection of abuse (crypto-mining, spam, malicious content).

tasks.description: Prometheus metrics export from actor, orchestrator, and tunnel-server — latency, throughput, error rates.
Structured logging with correlation IDs across all services (Rust tracing, Django logging).
Abuse detection pipeline — power consumption anomaly detection, network traffic pattern analysis.

milestones.title: Automated VM Template Provisioning
milestones.description: One-click VM template creation and deployment. Windows 10/11 and Linux images with GPU drivers, Sunshine, and Actor pre-installed.

tasks.description: Packer/cloud-init template builder for Windows and Linux VM images.
Template registry with versioning — automated updates for security patches and driver updates.

milestones.title: Internet-Facing Codec Terminals & Billing
milestones.description: Enable Codec Terminals to connect over public internet (beyond L2/L3 private networks). Pay-As-You-Go billing, credit packages, ad-supported free tier.

tasks.description: Public internet terminal connectivity — STUN/TURN, WebRTC fallback, GeoDNS routing.
Billing engine — credit packages, on-demand advertising, prepaid/postpaid models, invoice generation.
Ad-supported free tier — on-demand ad viewing in exchange for compute credits.

milestones.title: Corporate Licensing & Revenue Distribution
milestones.description: Enforce commercial license for deployments above 9 nodes per Constitution Article III.2. Automated dividend distribution to contributors via PIE tokens (TRC20).

tasks.description: Node-count detection and license enforcement — free tier bypass for individuals and small-scale ≤9 nodes.
PIE token smart contract (Tron TRC20) — minting, distribution, dividend allocation per Constitution Article III.
Automated dividend distribution pipeline — revenue → token holders, auditable on-chain.

milestones.title: Autonomous Governance (AI Gatekeeper)
milestones.description: AI-driven PR review system, formal verification layers, and automated merge/deploy pipeline per Constitution Article II. Staged rollout with human override until C > 0.95 confidence is empirically proven.

tasks.description: Stochastic Review Agent — AI analysis of PRs for logic consistency, security audit, and dependency minimalism.
Formal verification integration — static analysis, fuzzing, and property-based testing gates in CI/CD.
Confidence-weighted auto-merge pipeline — PRs above threshold auto-merge; below threshold queue for human review.

excluded_scopes.proprietary_cloud: No integration with non-standardized proprietary cloud providers.
excluded_scopes.telemetry: No collection of user data beyond hardware health and licensing node-counts.
excluded_scopes.obsolescence: Any feature promoting planned obsolescence is strictly prohibited.

known_technical_debt_from_audit: SessionRecoveryBuffer — UnsafeCell with unsafe Send+Sync (M5 T-501)
addin.rs — transmute between incompatible function pointer types (M5 T-502)
process.rs — arbitrary command execution from JS context (M5 T-503)
chpasswd — stdin injection via newlines in user parameter (M5 T-504)
noverify.rs — complete TLS verification disabled (M5 T-505)
70+ unwrap/expect in network-facing Rust paths (M5 T-506)
pickle.loads at 30+ locations in orchestrator — DB compromise = RCE
